ddls:
CREATE TABLE "foas" (
  "foa_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each FOA */,
  "foa_name" TEXT /* Name of the FOA */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FOA */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the FOA */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Close date of the FOA */,
  "total_funding_available" TEXT /* Total funding available for the FOA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_areas" (
  "activity_area_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity area */,
  "activity_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity area */,
  "parent_activity_area" TEXT /* Parent activity area (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_areas" (
  "program_area_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each program area */,
  "program_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the program area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program area */,
  "parent_program_area" TEXT /* Parent program area (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awardees" (
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each awardee */,
  "awardee_name" TEXT /* Name of the awardee */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., Non-Profit, Industry) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the awardee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the awardee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the awardee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the state belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "district_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the congressional district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the publication is related to */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the outcome is related to */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the impact is related to */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)
column_names: Total funding available for the FOA

Contact phone number for the awardee
Unique identifier for each congressional district
ID of the state the district belongs to
